Name: Percentage of cases where 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurs at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' across all traces
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities

Name: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurrences relative to all activity executions in the log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all cases

Name: Number of times 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' is followed by 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' that eventually lead to 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' in variants that result in 'SW-EIC Accept'
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurrences that are not followed by any reviewer agreement (e.g., followed only by 'SW-Reviewer Declined', 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable', or 'SW-Reviewer No Response')
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Ratio of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Number of traces where 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' appears more than once
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' events that occur before 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' in comparison to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' is followed within 7 days by 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Number of variants in which 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' directly precedes a reviewer invitation reminder (e.g., 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1')
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurrences that belong to traces ending in a revision decision ('SW-EIC Major Revision' or 'SW-EIC Minor Revision')
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' in traces that never reach 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
Metric: Number of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not occur
